channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump administration throws hundreds of affordable housing projects into limbo after contract cuts
item.description: The Trump administration has stalled at least $60 million in funding intended largely for affordable housing developments nationwide, throwing hundreds of projects into a precarious limbo, according to information and documents obtained by The Associated Press The move is part of a flurry of funding
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bragg to Liberty and back again: Ceremony to rechristen Army post once named for a Confederate
item.description: FORT BRAGG, N.C. (AP) — The short-lived existence of Fort Liberty came to an end Friday when the nation’s largest Army installation officially returned to its former name: Fort Bragg. Christened a century ago in honor of Confederate Gen.
item.dc:creator: ALLEN BREED and MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Homeland Security ends TSA collective bargaining agreement, in effort to dismantle union protections
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Department of Homeland Security said Friday that it is ending the collective bargaining agreement with the tens of thousands of frontline employees at the Transportation Security Administration, marking a major effort to dismantle union protections under the Trump administratio
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Teacher found dead at Tennessee high school
item.description: "Our thoughts and prayers are with the family, friends, students, and faculty affected by this heartbreaking event," police said.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Knox, NewsNation

item.title: Family on cruise ship gets lost luggage back after weeks of waiting, but half of their personal items are missing
item.description: Frustrations continue for Jason and Tammy Merritt after waiting a month for their lost luggage, which ended up being on-board the Carnival Cruise Line the entire time.
item.dc:creator: Mecca Thompson/KFOR, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump offers pathway to citizenship for South African farmers, families
item.description: President Trump has offered an expedited pathway to U.S. citizenship to South African farmers, calling their treatment in the country "terrible" and citing property laws that impose "unjust racial discrimination" against white Afrikaner farmers.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, KRON4

item.title: 3 Bulgarians convicted of spying for Russia across Europe from base in UK
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Three Bulgarian nationals based in Britain were convicted Friday by a London jury of spying for Russia on what police said was “an industrial scale.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MELLEY and JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: President Trump suggests he may not change daylight saving time
item.description: President Donald Trump indicated Thursday he may not push to end daylight saving time as Americans get ready to spring forward this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Connell, WGN 9

item.title: CSN loses $7.4M in 'Ghost Students' scheme
item.description: Cyber hackers targeted the College of Southern Nevada, and the school is now on the hook for millions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Peguero, NewsNation

item.title: Officials to give update on Gene Hackman, Betsy Arakawa death investigation: What to know
item.description: The Santa Fe County Sheriff’s Office is planning to share an update on its investigation into the mysterious deaths of Gene Hackman and wife Betsy Arakawa.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KRON4

item.title: Cheetos bags full of meth found at Indiana post office
item.description: Two Los Angeles residents have been arrested in southern Indiana after police found pounds of meth hidden inside Cheetos bags at a local post office.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, KREX 5

item.title: 12 indicted migrants allegedly assaulted officers at South Texas ICE lockup
item.description: A federal grand jury in South Texas has indicted 10 Mexican nationals and two men from Guatemala on charges of assaulting two correctional officers, U.S. Attorney Nicholas Ganjei announced.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: 2 more arrested in theft of bulldog puppies from Colorado store
item.description: Deputies arrested the man who allegedly snatched a pair of bulldog puppies from an enclosure at a Centennial pet store.
item.dc:creator: Heather Willard, NewsNation

item.title: Unexploded WWII-era bomb causes travel chaos in Paris, disrupts Europe's busiest railway hub
item.description: The discovery of a huge unexploded World War II-era bomb caused transportation chaos in Paris on Friday, including the suspension of high-speed train links with London and Brussels and the closure of a vital road artery into the French capital.
item.dc:creator: Samuel Petrequin, Fox 5

item.title: Flight attendant pleads guilty to secretly recording a 14-year-old girl in plane bathroom
item.description: A former American Airlines flight attendant has pleaded guilty to secretly recording video of a 14-year-old girl using an airplane bathroom.
item.dc:creator: Michael Casey, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: War heroes, a bomber and military firsts among 26,000 images flagged for removal in Pentagon's DEI purge
item.description: Photos seemed to be flagged for removal simply because their file included the word ”gay,” including an image of the B-29 aircraft Enola Gay, which dropped the first atomic bomb on Hiroshima, Japan, during World War II.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: President Trump puts limits on Elon Musk’s DOGE power
item.description: President Donald Trump pushed Elon Musk and Cabinet secretaries to be more careful in cuts to the federal workforce. He directed them to use a "scalpel" not a "hatchet.
item.dc:creator: Vinay Simlot, WGN 9

item.title: Walgreens set to go private in deal worth nearly $10 billion
item.description: Walgreens Boots Alliance says it has agreed to be acquired by private equity firm Sycamore Partners as the struggling retailer looks to turn itself around after years of losing money.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White House mocks Democrats' over ‘choose your fighter' video
item.description: The White House has joined the online roasting of Democratic House members for their viral “choose your fighter” TikTok video. “Democrats not be cringe challenge. Level: impossible,” the Trump administration’s rapid response account posted on the social platform X along with the video.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump signs executive order creating bitcoin reserve
item.description: Trump, who once called crypto a "scam," has drastically changed his tune on the subject and promised on the campaign trail to make the U.S. the "crypto capital of the world.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Life-saving avalanche forecasts could be hindered by Trump budget cuts
item.description: LEADVILLE, Colo. (AP) — Officials in the Western U.S. who warn the public about avalanches are sounding a different type of alarm.
item.dc:creator: BRITTANY PETERSON and MATTHEW BROWN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: First national analysis finds America's butterflies are disappearing at 'catastrophic' rate
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — America's butterflies are disappearing because of insecticides, climate change and habitat loss, with the number of the winged beauties down 22% since 2000, a new study finds.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge deciding whether to let charges drop against NYC Mayor Eric Adams is about to get key advice
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A former U.S. solicitor general who was brought in to help a federal judge decide whether to accept a Justice Department request to drop corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams is set to submit written arguments Friday. Judge Dale E.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: WATCH: Florida residents record SpaceX explosion
item.description: Residents in Tampa Bay, Florida were confounded after seeing what seemed to be an explosion in the sky around Thursday's sunset.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, KRON4

item.title: Suspects in Kansas City Chiefs fans' deaths plead not guilty
item.description: Jordan Willis and Ivory J. Carson pleaded not guilty during their arraignment in connection with the deaths of three Kansas City Chiefs fans who were found dead.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he will 'probably' extend TikTok ban deadline if deal isn't reached in time
item.description: President Trump on Thursday suggested he would consider extending the deadline for a ban on TikTok for a second time if a deal isn't reached, stating there is "a lot of interest" in the video-sharing platform.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KTLA 5

item.title: As DOGE slashes spending, it's missing millions of dollars hidden in plain sight
item.description: As DOGE looks for efficiencies, it may need to start with the government’s own money sitting unclaimed in many states, held by the government.
item.dc:creator: Peter Wilgoren, KTLA 5

item.title: Car being pulled from an Oregon river might have belonged to a family that vanished in 1958
item.description: Authorities said Thursday that they planned to pull a station wagon from an Oregon river believed to have belonged to a family of five that disappeared nearly 70 years ago while out searching for Christmas greenery.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: No prison time for man who bashed, disfigured mother’s face in front of child
item.description: Trevor Lee Colombano, 38, faced up to nine years in state prison in addition to 18 months in county jail after pleading no contest to assault with a deadly weapon, sexual battery and mayhem.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, NewsNation

item.title: Princeton preppy murder suspect’s parents are no-shows for accused killer son's court appearance
item.description: The Princeton, New Jersey, man accused of killing his brother and a family cat allegedly told police he had a "fit of madness" when they responded to the scene of the crime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News ‘Antisemitism Exposed’ Newsletter: A professor stands up to Columbia's tolerance of hate
item.description: Fox News' "Antisemitism Exposed" newsletter brings you stories on the rising anti-Jewish prejudice across the U.S. and the world.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
